name: Hot Chicken Salad Dgsv43a
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of chicken soup; undiluted
8 ounces Water chestnuts; drain and slice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine chicken, celery, mushrooms, onions, lemon juice, spices, water chestnuts, and rice.
2. Blend mayonnaise and soup; toss with chicken mixture.
3. Spoon into a 2-quart casserole.
4. In a skillet, melt butter and combine with the cornflakes and almonds.
5. Cook until lightly browned.
6. Top casserole with crumb mixture.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
One serving (of 6) = approximately 270 calories. This is a recipe of Michelle Wise, Spring Mills, Penn., reformated and brought to you by Judy Lausch DGSV43A. A great luncheon dish.
